speaker: Draymond Green
prediction_text: NYK will not beat PHI by 40 points in Game 2
argument: Expected adjustment: Philadelphia should be past the emotional high of beating Boston and respond more sharply in the next game; Tactical fixes: the 76ers need to get their bigs up to the level of Brunson's screens and shift Embiid's offense away from easy post-entry doubles.
grade_note: NYK won Game 2 108-102 (a 6-point margin), so they did not beat PHI by 40 points.
